2606.15893.title: BALTO: Balanced Token-Level Policy Optimization for Hallucination Mitigation
2606.15893.paper_summary: Hallucinations remain a major obstacle to deploying large language models (LLMs) in knowledge-intensive settings, where generated responses must be faithfully grounded in provided evidence. Reinforcement learning (RL) is a promising direction for hallucination mitigation, but response-level faithfulness rewards suffer from a granularity mismatch: localized hallucinations can cause supported content to receive spurious penalties. Although recent work introduces fine-grained feedback such as claim-level verification and token-level rewards, unbalanced credit assignment can still induce length, verbosity, or optimization-noise biases. We propose BALTO, a Balanced Token-level Policy Optimization framework for hallucination mitigation. BALTO extracts checkable factual claims, verifies them against the reference context, and projects claim-level judgments to token-level labels. A balanced token-level credit assignment mechanism is introduced into the framework. This design redistributes probability mass from unsupported content toward faithful content, rather than suppressing the entire response. We systematically analyze the limitations of response-level rewards from a theoretical standpoint, and prove BALTO's advantages in training stability and optimization efficiency for hallucination mitigation. Experiments on ConFiQA, RAGTruth, and FinLLM-Eval show that BALTO achieves the highest faithfulness across all six model--benchmark settings and consistently outperforms existing post-training baselines in Q-Score, demonstrating a stronger faithfulness--informativeness trade-off.
2606.15893.paper_summary_zh: 幻覺仍然是將大型語言模型（LLMs）部署於知識密集型環境中的主要障礙，在這些環境中，生成的回應必須忠實於提供的證據。強化學習（RL）是一個有前景的幻覺緩解方向，但回應級忠實獎勵存在粒度不匹配的問題：局部幻覺可能導致支持內容受到虛假的懲罰。儘管最近的研究引入了細粒度的反饋，例如聲明級驗證和標記級獎勵，但不平衡的信用分配仍然會引起長度、冗長或優化噪聲偏見。我們提出了BALTO，一個用於幻覺緩解的平衡標記級政策優化框架。BALTO提取可檢查的事實性聲明，並將其與參考上下文進行驗證，然後將聲明級判斷投影到標記級標籤上。框架中引入了一種平衡的標記級信用分配機制。這一設計將概率質量從不支持的內容重新分配到忠實的內容，而不是抑制整個回應。我們從理論角度系統地分析了回應級獎勵的局限性，並證明了BALTO在訓練穩定性和優化效率方面的優勢，以緩解幻覺。在ConFiQA、RAGTruth和FinLLM-Eval上的實驗顯示，BALTO在所有六個模型-基準設置中實現了最高的忠實度，並在Q-Score上始終優於現有的後訓練基準，顯示出更強的忠實度-信息量權衡。
2606.15893.author: Ning Li et.al.
2606.15893.authors: Ning Li, Zixuan Guo, Yan Xu, Wenbo Fei, Yifan Niu, Chang Luo, Yasheng Wang, Weiwen Liu, Yong Yu, Weinan Zhang
